title: Conversation Panel Files Tab - Summary of How Many Files
excerpt:
Please consider adding tracking qty to the title of the files tab in the conversation panel. It would be nice if it said Files / 2 , similar to updates - and same goes for the tab Info Boxes.

posts.author: AmberRanzoni (Amber Ranzoni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please consider adding tracking qty to the title of the files tab in the conversation panel. It would be nice if it said Files / 2 , similar to updates - and same goes for the tab Info Boxes.

  • 90% of the time the files column is overlooked because no one can tell anything is in there… I’m constantly redirecting people back to the original update’s files tab.

File Tab - no files shown available

Screenshot (190)2634×577 45.2 KB

Actually 2 Files available on same update

Screenshot (191)2952×1120 241 KB
